notes: Eval 0 (hybrid search): Tied on assertions. Baseline searched repo source code to find correct APIs. With-skill was 2x faster and used 55% fewer tokens.

Eval 1 (Locy): With-skill 100% vs baseline 57%. Baseline missed PROB annotation, used bulk_writer instead of Cypher, and skipped QUERY command. This eval shows the skill's core value — Locy has zero LLM training data.
Eval 2 (Pydantic OGM): Tied on assertions. Baseline searched repo source code. With-skill was 3.3x faster and used 64% fewer tokens.

Key finding: Even when assertions tie, with-skill runs are consistently faster (2-4x) and cheaper (50-64% fewer tokens) because the skill provides direct answers instead of requiring source code exploration.
